fruits.fresh_shelf_life: 5-7 days at room temperature, longer if refrigerated
fruits.fresh_storage_advice: Store in a cool place or refrigerate to extend freshness.
Store at room temperature and away from direct sunlight.

fruits.fresh_shelf_life: 5-10 days at room temperature, longer if refrigerated
fruits.fresh_storage_advice: Store in a cool, dry place or refrigerate for longer shelf life.

fruits.fresh_shelf_life: 2-5 days when ripe at room temperature, longer if refrigerated
fruits.fresh_storage_advice: Ripen at room temperature, then refrigerate ripe mangoes and inspect for leaking, mold, or fermented odor.

fruits.fresh_shelf_life: 3-7 days depending on ripeness and storage temperature
fruits.fresh_storage_advice: Keep uncut tomatoes dry and at room temperature when possible; refrigerate ripe tomatoes if needed to slow deterioration.

fruits.fresh_shelf_life: 2-4 days after ripening at room temperature, longer if refrigerated
fruits.fresh_storage_advice: Ripen at room temperature, then refrigerate and separate fruit showing mold, leaking, or collapsed flesh.
